innateAbility.name: Battle Stance
innateAbility.description: Toggle Off swaps back to Ranged Form.

abilities.name: Whirling Axes (Ranged)
abilities.description: Hurls a fistful of axes in a cone shape over a distance, slowing and damaging enemy units.

abilities.name: Whirling Axes (Melee)
abilities.description: Hurls axes around him in a close range area of effect, damaging enemy units and causing them to miss some attacks.

abilities.name: Fervor
abilities.description: With each continuous blow on the same target, Troll gains increased attack speed. If Troll changes targets, the stacks drops to nil.

abilities.name: Berserker's Rage
abilities.description: Grants different bonuses corresponding to the current Battle Stance.

abilities.name: Battle Trance
abilities.description: Unleashes a powerful battle trance, that forces Troll to continuously attack the closest enemy unit, prioritizing heroes, within the radius.Grants Troll bonus lifesteal, bonus attack speed, and bonus movement speed.

talents.right: Battle Trance Grants Allies Attack Speed
